# Dishkin — AI Recipe Generator App

> Dishkin is an AI recipe generator: create recipes from what is in your fridge, keep your personal cookbook and make shopping lists. The website publishes recipes generated by Dishkin users in 40+ languages, plus verified traditional dishes.

## Pages

- [Home (English)](https://dishkin.com/en): Recent recipes, search and category overview
- [Categories](https://dishkin.com/en/categories): All recipe categories with counts
- [Sitemap](https://dishkin.com/sitemap.xml): Full index of recipes and categories in every language

## Apps

- [iOS app](https://apps.apple.com/app/id6784972752): Dishkin on the App Store
- [Android app](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=store.evsi.recipesgenerator): Dishkin on Google Play

## Notes

- Localized versions live under /{locale}, e.g. /ru, /es, /de
- Recipe pages include Recipe structured data (JSON-LD)
